languages.text: В спешке брошенные инструменты. Некоторые — со следами крови, другие — со сломанными рукоятками, словно бы ими пытались отбиваться.
Tools tossed aside in a hurry. Some have bloodstains on them, others have broken handles, as if they were used to fend off an attack.
languages.original_text: В спешке брошенные инструменты. Некоторые — со следами крови, другие — со сломанными рукоятками, словно бы ими пытались отбиваться.

traits.locale_text: Tools tossed aside in a hurry. Some have bloodstains on them, others have broken handles, as if they were used to fend off an attack.
Tools tossed aside in a hurry. Some have bloodstains on them, others have broken handles, as if they were used to fend off an attack.
Tools tossed aside in a hurry. Some have bloodstains on them, others have broken handles, as if they were used to fend off an attack.

languages.text: 急いで投げ捨てられた道具。中には血痕が付いたもの、柄が折れたものもある。襲撃から身を守るために使われたのかもしれない。
languages.original_text: Tools tossed aside in a hurry. Some have bloodstains on them, others have broken handles, as if they were used to fend off an attack.

traits.locale_text: 急いで投げ捨てられた道具。中には血痕が付いたもの、柄が折れたものもある。襲撃から身を守るために使われたのかもしれない。

languages.text: Aceleyle kenara fırlatılmış aletler. Bazılarının üzerinde kan lekeleri var, diğerlerinin sapları kırılmış. Sanki bir saldırıyı savuşturmada kullanılmışlar.
languages.original_text: Tools tossed aside in a hurry. Some have bloodstains on them, others have broken handles, as if they were used to fend off an attack.

traits.locale_text: Aceleyle kenara fırlatılmış aletler. Bazılarının üzerinde kan lekeleri var, diğerlerinin sapları kırılmış. Sanki bir saldırıyı savuşturmada kullanılmışlar.

languages.text: Varias herramientas desechadas apresuradamente. Algunas están manchadas de sangre y otras tienen el mango roto, como si se hubieran utilizado para defenderse de un ataque.
languages.original_text: Tools tossed aside in a hurry. Some have bloodstains on them, others have broken handles, as if they were used to fend off an attack.

traits.locale_text: Varias herramientas desechadas apresuradamente. Algunas están manchadas de sangre y otras tienen el mango roto, como si se hubieran utilizado para defenderse de un ataque.

languages.text: 被匆忙丢弃的工具。一些沾有血迹，另一些的握柄已经断裂，仿佛曾被用来抵御攻击。
languages.original_text: Tools tossed aside in a hurry. Some have bloodstains on them, others have broken handles, as if they were used to fend off an attack.

traits.locale_text: 被匆忙丢弃的工具。一些沾有血迹，另一些的握柄已经断裂，仿佛曾被用来抵御攻击。

languages.text: Des outils abandonnés là dans l'urgence. Certains présentent des traces de sang quand d'autres ont la poignée brisée, comme si on s'en était servi pour repousser une attaque.
languages.original_text: Tools tossed aside in a hurry. Some have bloodstains on them, others have broken handles, as if they were used to fend off an attack.

traits.locale_text: Des outils abandonnés là dans l'urgence. Certains présentent des traces de sang quand d'autres ont la poignée brisée, comme si on s'en était servi pour repousser une attaque.

languages.text: Eilig weggeworfene Werkzeuge. Einige sind blutig, andere haben abgebrochene Griffe, als wären sie benutzt worden, um einen Angriff abzuwehren.
languages.original_text: Tools tossed aside in a hurry. Some have bloodstains on them, others have broken handles, as if they were used to fend off an attack.

traits.locale_text: Eilig weggeworfene Werkzeuge. Einige sind blutig, andere haben abgebrochene Griffe, als wären sie benutzt worden, um einen Angriff abzuwehren.
